description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

The Apache Tomcat Manager web application exposes a text-based HTTP API for deploying, undeploying, listing, starting, stopping, and inspecting web applications running inside a Tomcat server. All commands require HTTP Basic authentication by a user holding the `manager-script` role. Responses are plain text where the first line begins with `OK -` on success or `FAIL -` on error.

Contact Support:
 Name: Apache Tomcat
